title: Factor Parameters — Refrigerants (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'refrigerants'. Covers fluorinated gases and natural refrigerant leakage / recharge / recovery. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

gas_code.description: Refrigerant gas code per ASHRAE R-number convention (e.g., 'R-134a', 'R-410A', 'HFC-32', 'CO2', 'NH3', 'R-404A'). For blends, use the blend R-number; itemise components in gas_blend_components.

mass_fraction.description: Mass fraction of this component in the blend.

gas_blend_components.description: Array of {component, mass_fraction} pairs for refrigerant blends. INVARIANT: sum of mass_fraction values MUST equal 1.0 ± 0.001.

leakage_basis.description: How the factor quantifies leakage. 'annual' = kg leaked per year of operation; 'charge' = kg leaked per kg installed (initial charge basis); 'disposal' = kg leaked at end-of-life.

recharge_assumption.description: Annual recharge rate as fraction of full charge. Typical 0.05–0.20 for commercial refrigeration.

recovery_treatment.description: End-of-life treatment. 'none' = vented; 'partial_recovery' = some mass recovered, rest vented; 'full_recovery' = ≥95% recovered; 'destroyed' = recovered and destroyed (incineration / plasma).
